Test Server Helper:
How may I help you?
*About characters*
"I want to complete the first class transfer."
"I want to complete the second class transfer."
"I want to complete the third class transfer."
"I want to become a Noblesse!"
"I want to learn all skills."

*About Items*
"I need some gear."
"I want to purchase some Enhancers and such."

*About Clans*
"Can I raise my clan level?"
